name: Apollo Bay Beach
description: A pristine beach perfect for swimming and building sandcastles.
distance: In town, walkable from Apollo Bay Holiday Park

name: Great Otway National Park
description: Rainforest walks, waterfalls and wildlife across a protected natural area.

name: Maits Rest Rainforest Walk
description: Easy loop walk through ancient cool temperate rainforest.

name: Cape Otway Lighthouse
description: Historic lighthouse with panoramic coastal views and maritime history exhibits.
distance: 25km from Apollo Bay — worth the drive for older kids

name: Otway Fly Treetop Walk
description: Elevated walkway and zipline through the rainforest canopy.

name: Split Rock Beach
description: Sheltered beach with rock pools ideal for young children.

name: Melba Gully State Park
description: Fern gullies, native birds and glow worms at night.

name: Apollo Bay Harbour
description: Working fishing harbour with fresh seafood, walks and playgrounds.
distance: In town, 5 mins from Apollo Bay Holiday Park

name: Kennett River
description: Famous koala spotting spot on the Great Ocean Road.

name: Lorne Beach
description: Patrolled beach with cafes and a great main street for a day trip.
